error_signature: Merge node doesn't work as expected
title: Merge Node not producing expected output
symptom: The Merge node is not outputting multiple items as expected when merging on ID. Instead, it combines them into a single item.
not_this_if: Merge node is set to Append mode
root_cause: The Merge node in Combine mode is designed to merge multiple input items into a single output item, which is not suitable for scenarios where multiple outputs are desired based on a specific key like ID.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the Merge node
Change the mode from Combine to Append
agent_instruction: Change the Merge node mode to Append and save the workflow.
